data_model: DomainDNSRecord: type (TXT|MX|CNAME), name (string), content (string), ttl (string|'Auto'), priority (number|null), status (verified|pending|failed). Domain has sending_enabled (boolean), receiving_enabled (boolean).

description: Bounce Rate section with expandable info panel, chart, and breakdown table
